name: Chicken & Stuffing Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 oz can mushrooms, drained and liquid reserved
4 oz sliced Colby or American cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix crust ingredients well in a medium bowl; press into greased 12-inch pie pan. Set aside.
2. Combine mushroom liquid with flour and set aside.
3. In a saucepan on top of the stove, sauté mushrooms and onions in butter or margarine.
4. Stir in all remaining ingredients, including the mushroom liquid/flour mixture, except the cheese.
5. Heat thoroughly.
6. Turn into crust and bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
7. Cut each slice of cheese into strips. Place on top of pie in a lattice fashion and bake 5 more minutes.
